name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake (Micro)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter and brown sugar in an 8x8 inch baking dish.
2. Microwave on HIGH for 1-1/2 to 2 minutes, or until the butter and sugar melt.
3. Stir the mixture.
4. Arrange the pineapple tidings and cherries (if using) in syrup.
5. In a medium mixing bowl, blend the yellow cake mix, reserved pineapple juice, and eggs on low speed of an electric mixer.
6. Beat the mixture on medium speed for 2 minutes.
7. Pour the batter evenly over the fruit.
8. Microwave for 8-1/2 to 10 minutes on HIGH, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean (rotate the dish halfway through cooking).
9. Immediately invert the dish onto a serving plate and remove it.
10. Cool
